review_title: Easy to use, easy to set up and provides our company with a professional image
description: Much greater security for sending and receiving customer information , both documents and messages. A more professional customer experience.
author: Calvin O.
pros: The on-boarding process as a new user is very good with helpful videos. The software is easy to set up and amend. The option to upgrade to custom branding presents a professional image to our customers. I feel this is a much safer system than allowing customers to send their documents to us via unencrypted emails.
cons: I would love this software to integrate with Timely who provide our office diary. I would also like the option for a file invite to expire and be deleted from the providers server after a set time.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: This saves me SO much time, and makes my job more enjoyable.
description: I don't know I used to do my job before FileInvite?! It has really changed the way I work, I have a lot more time to focus on important tasks, rather than chasing people for the right documents. Not to mention, whenever I've had an issue or I don't know how something works, the customer service team has been on hand to help. For your sake, seriously consider this software, it solves so many problems I didn't even know we had!!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Fileinvite does exactly what good software is meant to do. It makes life easier! I get the documents I need from my colleagues and their clients so quickly. If something isn't quite right, I reject it in file invite, and they usually send me the correct documents in a few hours. It also does all the file organising for me!
cons: My only grievance is that I can't transfer an invite to a colleague. We worked around it when I went on leave, but it would be a great addition.

review_title: Its great however it is a long winded path to get into drop box
author: Alanna R.
pros: I like how all uploaded info can go straight to our clients efile into their personalised file under drop box,
cons: Not liking the amount of clicks you need to go thr ough to get to the path in their efile under our drop box.

description: It helps to keep control over document requests.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to collect similar list of uploads from various customers. Great digital signing option.
cons: Status {RETURNED} is confusing in case some invites were not correctly completed.

description: Document collation is an important part of our process. Prior to using this system we would normally have clients emailing documents to our email address. The risk to this is of emails being missed in among the volume of emails we get and the process not operating smoothly.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Our clients find FileInvite easy to use which is our ultimate aim when using this type of document collation service. Once set-up it is easy for us to manage the process with documents being converted into PDF and transferred into our online system automatically ready for us to check and utilize for our clients application.
cons: When we use our templates there are times that some of the documents being requested within the template are not required for the client involved. We can only delete one document at a time. It would be great if we could check the documents we don't need and then press delete rather than having to delete each one individually.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love that its easy for my clients to use
cons: That i can only do 25 requests a month and i need more than that in a given month sometimes.

review_title: Easy way to collect the documents without chasing the client
description: Easily collect documents and keep track over them without chasing them for documents
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Great way to easily invite the client to upload documents and track them,frequent notification free from manual chasing them
cons: many more additional features can added,timestamp,sent out share etc so as may features can be added

review_title: Great document collection tool - makes the process easy to collect documents.
description: Ease of use. Streamlines the document collection process. Speeds up the document collection process.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to implement. Customized branding for mid and higher grade applications. Works with several applications and easy API integration. Nice product for price. Good for single, team or corporate application.
cons: White Label in highest grade only. Needs ability to set workflows and timed actions. Needs an unlimited Invite option.

description: I like this application and use it on the regular basis as part of conducting business.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Facilitates collection of different documents very easy. Allows to collect different information, efile it and forward to the clients in an efficient manner. Like the automated reminders.
cons: Would be very helpful to have some additional features added, like a time stamp, for a example.

review_title: It has streamlined the document exchange with my clients. The sync feature, saves us hours of time!
description: It is a huge time saver!
author: Ryan P.
pros: Easy to use, they have a great and responsive support team. The client interface is allows for an easy way for clients to upload documents.

review_title: Easy to collect documents from clients
author: Nikunj A.
pros: The most amazing feature of file invite is to copy the file invite and templates. It makes so easy to collect all the documents from clients.
cons: When you search file invite it takes a lot of time to process and show the results.

author: Kevin D.
pros: It is a great advantage that it has an easy interface that the user can learn very easily. It is a user friendly application.
cons: Increasing the number of requests more will increase my usage. This is its only limitation, but it is very important to many users.

author: Santino M.
pros: FileInvite is very easy to navigate with great features to communicate between clients and myself. A very secure platform that allows for us to upload confidential files without worrying. The automated follow ups are an excellent feature that save a lot of time and provides timely reminders. The ability to save files as PDF instead of pictures saves a lot of time.
cons: No major issues have been experienced with FileInvite.

author: Philip B.
pros: Saves time and puts all our files in one please hard to not be happy with it.
cons: I wish I didn't have to add a +1 when creating a new contact if we could set a default region for contact creation to save time that would be great we only do business in the US.

description: it enable us to keep notes on all files as a Mortgage broker, which is essential
author: Robert B.
pros: Easy to use plenty of room for file notes
cons: Not anything Major really i find it quite easy t0 use

author: Melanie C.
pros: Here at my business we use this app for file sharing. It makes a great communication tool, simple and fast.
cons: I don't have any cons for this app as of right now.

description: Documentation is easy to obtain from clients and accessibility to this information is at a click away.
author: Heather L.
pros: Easy to direct a client to upload their documentation to ensure we receive the documentation in a timely manner.
cons: The software has no faults that I can see being an issue

description: Collecting documents is one of the most time consuming parts of our process, and clients are always confused and annoyed at it. FileInvite completely optimises this process and helps walk clients through the process.
author: Adam B.
pros: Time savings Clients love it Easy to use Easy to customise Optimises the most time consuming part of our business
cons: The link to Cashdeck was delayed, but it is part of the software now

author: Scott B.
pros: We spend a lot of time gathering required information for clients and their home loan application. We have now templated our requests to suit each lender and we can see if the client has opened it, uploaded info and of course returned it - very simple and easy to use
cons: Not everyone one of clients use it and of course, I would be happier if it were cheaper, but I still think it's value for money
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: File invite is a game changer
author: Timor T.
pros: Saves a lot of time and keeps things arranged and avoids multiple emails from clients with documents all over the place.
cons: The lack of other languages, mainly French and Russian. I live in a country where people sometimes don't necessarily fluent in English. To have an option of other languages will be wonderful!

review_title: Set it and forget it -- and still get what you need
description: Hours of my time and focus back.
author: Kate Rae D.
pros: I love the "set it and forget it" model. Projects that used to take hours of follow-up to get all the necessary components are now done with a minimum expense of my time: maybe 3 minutes to set up, and another few to download everything once it's returned. The software takes care of sending reminders to my collaborators, and I get to maintain better relationships.
cons: The menu has a lot of options that are symbol-based, so it can be hard to know where to go for what you need. Pretty quick learning curve (especially if you're using it regularly), but frustrating only in that it feels more difficult than it needs to be.

description: Able to obtain required documents from clients all in one portal. Clients can fill in a PDF and even add an electronic signature to the forms.
author: Steve L.
pros: Helps the process of obtaining necessary and required documents for clients. The widget which you can place on your business website is invaluable. Once you get past the learning curve, it is easy to use and your customers will like using it. The support is unbelievable helpful and prompt.
cons: None that I can see, other than the learning curve could have been shorter, but I believe a big part of that was me.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Patrick O.
pros: Saves me time collating documents. Integrates with bankstatements.com.au which provides a seamless experience for clients to provide statements.
cons: Some clients have complained that it is sometimes slow to upload. Other than that everything is fine.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fantastic - Simple to use and an easy way to gather documents.
author: James K.
pros: I like how the files convert to PDF and automatically save to my laptop. Also, the ease at which clients can upload information, from their smartphone or computer.
cons: Would like files to sync with OneDrive and Box. Also, the speed throughout the site can be on the slow side.

review_title: I love Fileinvite - finally my world is easier and clients know what to do!
author: Sarah B.
pros: Its so easy with templates - and I do tailor each clients needs as well. I know when they are working on my requests and we have easy conversations between us to get to an end result - that being I have the documents I need from them - what a win/win
cons: I do love this software - would like it to be a bit cheaper however the professionalism it shows to my clients is worth it - I have even put other advisers onto FileInvite. There's enough work for all of us!
